title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
June has witnessed a persistently weaker sentiment in crude freight rates. Read More

A Need for Renewal
Against the backdrop of escalating environmental pressure and a political focus on developing renewable energy in recent years, we also see increasing warnings from oil producers and industry veterans that significant new investment in global upstream oil and gas development is needed by 2030 to meet market needs and to prevent a supply shortfall, even if demand growth slows toward a plateau in the longer term. Read More

The three things I would tell my clients this week
For four hundred and twenty three years, Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, has presented audiences with the ostensibly ultimate dilemma: To Be, or Not To Be.

children.title: Growth in several major economies was stronger than envisaged at the beginning of the year
section_path: Growth in several major economies was stronger than envisaged at the beginning of the year
children.section_path_text: Growth in several major economies was stronger than envisaged at the beginning of the year
children.summary: Geared segments concluded today in the red, mirroring concerns for the big picture on their balancing levels. On the flip side, gearless segments focused on specific commodity trades and reported weekly gains, anticipating more active weeks in the usual staple iron ore and grain runs.

children.title: Energy and metals jumped amid anticipation of Chinese stimulus
section_path: Energy and metals jumped amid anticipation of Chinese stimulus
children.section_path_text: Energy and metals jumped amid anticipation of Chinese stimulus
children.summary:
This was aided by a risk on tone across markets following a lower-than-expected inflation print in the US. Read More

children.title: A risk-on tone helped boost sentiment across commodity markets, aided by supply side issues.
section_path: A risk-on tone helped boost sentiment across commodity markets, aided by supply side issues.
children.section_path_text: A risk-on tone helped boost sentiment across commodity markets, aided by supply side issues.
children.summary: Crude oil rallied amid prospects of stronger demand in China. The issue of larger than normal crude oil import quotas for domestic refiners boosted sentiment.

children.summary:

children.title: Retail sales growth this year has shifted and exceeded inflation throughout the year
section_path: Retail sales growth this year has shifted and exceeded inflation throughout the year
children.section_path_text: Retail sales growth this year has shifted and exceeded inflation throughout the year
children.summary:
While China's retail sales data at the time of writing is still pending for May, of note is that inflation in May grew year-on-year by only 0.2%. Read More
